creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

Boca Grande, Florida, is a true hidden gem and makes for the perfect day trip! Just one hour south of Sarasota and 1 hour north of Ft. Myers on Florida’s southwest coast. Have you ever been?

1. Johann Fust Community Library
2. Gasparilla Island Lighthouse
3. Our Lady of Mercy Catholic Church
4. Whidden Marina
5. Pink Elephant for lunch

 #bocagrande #floridavacation #thingstodoinflorida #hiddengems #gasparillaisland

transcription.text: You need to add this hidden gem beach town to your Florida bucket list. Welcome to Boca Grande located on Gasparilla Island off Florida's southwest coast about one hour south of Sarasota. This is a perfect place for a day trip so here is what I suggest doing. First to get on the island you'll pay six dollars cash or credit card to cross the Boca Grande Causeway. Look to the left as you're crossing to see the old dilapidated train tracks running over the emerald green water. Your first stop is going to be the Johann Fust library built in 1949. You're probably thinking seriously a library but trust me this is like no library you've ever seen. It's so beautiful and calming here and I regretted not bringing any work with me because this outdoor sitting area is so peaceful. They have a display of incredible shells donated by the DuPont family that you can even buy and an adorable children's area. Then check out the Gasparilla Island lighthouse which was built in 1881 and located to Gasparilla Island from Delaware in 1927. And yes you can climb it 132 steps and 12 ladder steps to the top. Then go see the Our Lady of Mercy Catholic Church built in 1950. Like with most things in Boca Grande the serenity and beauty of it blew me away. Then go to Wooden Marina which is a rustic ramshackle marina with a maritime museum and funky gift shop. The marina was founded in 1925 and is still run by the Witten family. This is true old Florida. Also I love the cat. Grab lunch.
